item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
catalog='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/catalog.json'
handoff='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/docs/handoff.md'

jq -e '(.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and .schema_version==1' \""'$catalog"
echo '"'SCHEMA PASS: schema_version=1 type=number'

jq -e '(.owner|type)==\"string\" and .owner==\"release\"' \""'$catalog"
if rg -n -i -F '"'ops' \""'$catalog" "$handoff"; then exit 1; fi
echo '"'OWNER PASS: owner=release type=string abandoned_owner_matches=0'

jq -e '(.items|type)==\"array\" and (.items|length)==2 and [.items[].name]==[\"alpha\",\"beta\"] and all(.items[]; (.name|type)==\"string\" and (.enabled|type)==\"boolean\" and .enabled==true)' \""'$catalog"
echo '"'ITEMS PASS: order=alpha,beta names=string,string enabled=true,true enabled_types=boolean,boolean'

rg -n -F 'source of truth' \""'$handoff"
echo '"'PHRASE PASS: literal case-sensitive phrase present'

jq -e '([..|objects|has(\"notes\")]|any|not)' \""'$catalog"
echo '"'NOTES PASS: notes_fields=0'

if rg -n -i '("'^|[''^[:alnum:]_])(timestamp|datestamp)([''^[:alnum:]_]|$)|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}|[0-9]{1,2}/[0-9]{1,2}/[0-9]{2,4}|[0-9]{1,2}:[0-9]{2}(:[0-9]{2})?([[:space:]]*(AM|PM))?|January|February|March|April|May|June|July|August|September|October|November|December'"' \""'$catalog" "$handoff"; then exit 1; else echo '"'TIMESTAMP PASS: forbidden_timestamp_or_datestamp_matches=0'; fi"

item.aggregated_output:
true
SCHEMA PASS: schema_version=1 type=number
true
OWNER PASS: owner=release type=string abandoned_owner_matches=0
true
ITEMS PASS: order=alpha,beta names=string,string enabled=true,true enabled_types=boolean,boolean
3:Operators should treat `catalog.json` as the source of truth for catalog ownership, item order, and enabled state. Process items from top to bottom and update the catalog directly when an item's state changes.
PHRASE PASS: literal case-sensitive phrase present
true
NOTES PASS: notes_fields=0
TIMESTAMP PASS: forbidden_timestamp_or_datestamp_matches=0
